description_long: This object consists of a rectangular milk or juice carton with a white exterior, featuring printed black text and branding, standing upright next to a transparent plastic cup. Alongside the carton and cup, there is a round plate holding a slice of bread, a banana, and an orange, all arranged neatly. The carton displays detailed product information, including a brand label, nutritional facts, and a percentage value, suggesting it is a dairy or juice product. The cup is empty and made of clear plastic, while the plate appears to be a simple, flat, brown surface. The bread slice is square and lightly colored, the banana is yellow and slightly curved, and the orange is round and vibrant. The overall composition suggests a ready-to-eat breakfast or snack set, commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A white juice or milk carton with black text stands beside a clear plastic cup and a plate holding a banana, orange, and bread slice, forming a typical breakfast set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carton label, clear cup, and plate with banana, orange, and bread slice.
description_view_1: Rear view of the carton with nutritional panel visible, partially obscuring the plate and fruit.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the carton, cup, and a clear arrangement of the orange, banana, and bread on the plate.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the back of the carton, the clear cup, and the plate with fruit and bread.
